name: FinFolio
description: A comprehensive portfolio tracker managing transactions, parsing live markets, importing CSVs and displaying customizable matrices.

uiStandards.utilities: Expandable menus for Issues and DPs, unexpanded by default. Dynamic counts in titles.
uiStandards.matrix: No redundant scrip counts. Prominent CSV export button for filtered data.
uiStandards.history: Total transaction count in main title, independent of scrip filters.
uiStandards.scrapers: Undo button for accidental URL deletion to improve UX.
